## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` locally — builds + typecheck passes
- [ ] I ran dogfood: `node packages/cli/dist/index.js check --config freezeops.yml` — passes
- [ ] If adding a config pack, I tested it with the CLI: `node packages/cli/dist/index.js check --config configs/NAME.yml`
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or justified in PR description)
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing rule types or config format
- [ ] Docs updated if relevant (README, docs/, examples/)
